name: Das USA Inc Which Will Do Bus
registry_source: D&B / NJ Division of Revenue (via Dun & Bradstreet listing)
notes: No FMCSA/SAFER record found under 'Das USA' or 'Das USA Inc' (SAFER keyword search returns zero matches). The D&B profile for Das USA Inc at 67 Walnut Ave #203, Clark NJ 07066 classifies the business as furniture and home furnishings wholesale, not as a bus carrier. Officers David Riley, John Hedges, Zoe Loeb listed; registered agent Northwest Registered Agent LLC. Most recent mailing address change reported 03/18/2015. The truncated source name 'Which Will Do Bus' likely reflects a 'which will do business as' designation in the NJ filing; the entity does not appear in FMCSA passenger carrier records. Likely not a bona fide school-bus operator — recommend manual confirmation against NJ Treasury business name search before further outreach.

name: Clear Sky Ent Inc Which Will
registry_source: CA Secretary of State bizfile (not located)
notes: No FMCSA/SAFER match for 'Clear Sky Ent' in California. SAFER keyword search for 'CLEAR SKY' returns five carriers (Clear Sky Landscape Inc — Santa Ana CA; Clear Sky LLC — Lucedale MS; Clear Sky Services Corp — Merrick NY; Clear Sky Transport Inc — Soap Lake WA; Clear Sky Trucking Corp — Lehigh Acres FL). None matches Moreno Valley CA or 13715 Adios St 92555. The Adios St address is a single-family residence (sold Aug 2017 for $382,800 per Redfin); no commercial bus operations apparent. A 'Clear Sky Enterprises LLC' filed with CA SOS on 3/24/2011 in Glendale and is no longer active (different city). Likely a dormant or never-registered intrastate operator — name may be truncated DBA reference and the entity may not exist as a current bus carrier.

name: Point To Point School Bus Svc
carrier_operation: Intrastate, non-hazmat, passenger (for-hire / private passenger non-business)
entity_status: active (operating; TX SOS filing not confirmed in search)
registry_source: Texas Secretary of State / Texas Comptroller (taxable entity search) — not directly queried
notes: FMCSA SAFER snapshot confirms Point To Point School Bus Service LLC, USDOT 2273535, MC-842714 (docket also surfaced as MC-1500563 form ID in SAFER search). Physical address matches input (1414 Reesling Dr, Mesquite TX 75150). USDOT number first added 2/15/2012, suggesting formation ~2012. Very small operator: 1 power unit, 1 driver, 10,000 reported annual miles (2024). No inspections or crashes in trailing 24 months; no safety rating. Operating as private passenger / intrastate for-hire passenger non-hazmat. NOT AUTHORIZED for interstate for-hire. Doing business via pointtopointdallas.com (school bus rental, church/charter). David Hollins listed as the principal per LinkedIn. Texas SOS / Comptroller filing details not retrieved (requires manual lookup at comptroller.texas.gov taxable entity search).

name: School Bus Logistics LLC
carrier_operation: Not a motor carrier — pupil-transportation routing/consulting firm
registry_source: Company website (schoolbuslogistics.com/our-team); CO SOS business database (not directly queried — bizfile blocked)
notes: NOT A SCHOOL-BUS OPERATOR. School Bus Logistics LLC is a routing-consulting and software firm (RouteHub) serving school districts and bus contractors nationwide. Founded 2010 by Robert Jacobus. HQ 3000 Race St, Denver CO 80205 (address matches input). No FMCSA/SAFER record (keyword search for 'SCHOOL BUS LOGISTICS' returns zero matches), no power units, no buses — services include operational consulting, bell schedule analysis, fleet utilization studies, route planning. Should be excluded from a tuck-in pipeline of bus operators; potentially relevant as a vendor/software-services target but not a fleet acquisition. Founding year 2010 confirmed in multiple sources (PRWeb, company About page).

name: Beal School Bus Co
carrier_operation: Intrastate only, non-hazmat, passenger (school bus contractor)
inc_date: 1965 (in business since; NM SOS formal filing date not retrieved)
registry_source: NM Secretary of State enterprise.sos.nm.gov (not directly queried); D&B; APS contractor list
notes: FMCSA SAFER snapshot confirms BEAL SCHOOL BUS, USDOT 1939692, physical address 204 Camino Cinco SW, Albuquerque NM 87105 — matches input exactly. 18 power units, 15 drivers, intrastate-only non-hazmat passenger operation. MCS-150 last filed 9/17/2009 (registration noted as outdated as of 6/3/2026). No MC number; not authorized for interstate for-hire. No safety rating; zero inspections/crashes reported in trailing window. Company in business since 1965 per D&B and multiple directory sources; appears on APS (Albuquerque Public Schools) contractor list. Principals: John Beal (founder / primary contact per Yelp) and Denny R. Beal (current contact per directories). Contact bealbus.db@comcast.net, 505-877-9239. NM Secretary of State entity filing date was not retrievable through search — manual lookup at enterprise.sos.nm.gov recommended to confirm formal inc_date.
